title: Recursion, Recurrences, and Divide-and-Conquer · Execution Trace: Recurrence Model
summary: Break a large document and spatial search problem into independently checkable subproblems. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa recurrence model increment in a recursive solver with recurrence evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write and interpret recurrences for divide, solve, and combine costs.
Trace call trees, stack depth, repeated subproblems, and returned values.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
